title: Spicy Dutch Burger
description: A plant-based burger alternative made with flaky pastry and spicy dutch flavors.

ingredients.name: Spicy Dutch Sauce
ingredients.notes: Make sure to choose a vegan option

instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they're translucent.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they're tender.
Add the lentils and cook until they're heated through.
Add the vegan burger patty and cook until it's browned on both sides.
Assemble the burger by placing the patty on the flaky pastry.
Add the spicy dutch sauce, lettuce, tomatoes, and vegan mayo on top.
Cook the pastry in the pan for an additional 2-3 minutes or until it's golden brown.
Serve the burger hot and enjoy!
